import (

	"encoding/binary"
	"fmt"
	"hash/crc32"

	Key   string

output_preview: w.lastSyncOffset = w.currentOffset

cmd: awk 'NR==42 {print "	path           string"} {print}' /workspace/wal.go > temp && mv temp /workspace/wal.go

sed -i 's/        closeCh:        make(chan struct{}),/        closeCh:        make(chan struct{}),\
        path:           path,/' /workspace/wal.go

sed -i '125a\	\/\/ Update the sync offset marker file after successful sync to indicate \
	\/\/ the latest safe truncation point \
	sidecarPath := w.path + ".sync" \
	buf := make([]byte, 8) \
	binary.LittleEndian.PutUint64(buf, uint64(w.lastSyncOffset)) \
	\/\/ Best-effort write — if this fails the crash-recover will \
	\/\/ truncate to 0 which is safe (just loses more data). \
	os.WriteFile(sidecarPath, buf, 0644)' /workspace/wal.go
